messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

The 'fetchUsers' function makes the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 16) change on every render. Move it inside the useEffect callback. Alternatively, wrap the definition of 'fetchUsers' in its own useCallback() Hook.

The 'fetchQuery' function makes the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 42) change on every render. Move it inside the useEffect callback. Alternatively, wrap the definition of 'fetchQuery' in its own useCallback() Hook.
